summary: Software engineer with 3+ years building production-critical data systems at a global bank (OTC trade reporting, tens of millions of daily transactions). Full-stack builder across Python pipelines, React/TypeScript dashboards, and LLM-powered applications. Currently co-building a deployed AI platform for a consulting agency — embedded with the founder, translating business needs into shipped tools at speed. Cornell CS & ME.

Bank of America: Owned production services on the OTC **trade reporting** engine, processing **tens of millions of transactions daily** across the bank's capital markets operations.

Designed and shipped an extensible **reference-data framework**: orchestrated pipeline of services via message queues querying multiple external APIs per trade event, with retries, load balancing, and error handling.
Built a **T+1 trade validation service** checking trade-ID uniqueness across counterparties and issuing automated corrections at millions of transactions/day.
Developed a parallelized **backreporting service**, automating a manual process with significant throughput gains — scoped solution and shipped independently.

Operated with **high autonomy across teams**, translating requirements from operations and compliance stakeholders into production-grade solutions; optimized service reliability and throughput by orders of magnitude.
Microsoft: Built data processing and annotation pipelines for **production ML models**; cleaned, transformed, and reported on user-collected datasets for the data science team.
Northrop Grumman: Released 50+ engineering drawings including new designs and large assemblies; performed structural analyses for flight and test components.

Benchmark Agency Platform.desc: Technical platform for a consulting agency with **paying clients**. Multi-tenant **financial-intelligence dashboard** (revenue, equipment P&L, staff comp, **AI-generated recommendations**) with row-level security. Lead-gen pipeline: discovery, web enrichment, deficiency scoring, and personalized outreach via **Claude**. Embedded with founder — rapid prototyping from real user feedback.

Market Data Dashboard.desc: Ingests live data from **multiple financial APIs** (Binance, Hyperliquid); automated **alerting pipeline** with SMS notifications and monitoring dashboards.

Reading Recommendations App.desc: **LLM-powered** recommender with prompt engineering, API orchestration, and error handling over a Project Gutenberg corpus.

bullets: **CUAIR (Cornell Unmanned Aircraft)** — Built systems for an autonomous plane with obstacle avoidance, object classification, and airdrop; consistently top team at AUVSI SUAS competition.
